Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Of Class And Paga Claims Without Prejudice; Declaration Of Mariam Ghazaryan; [Proposed] Order Thereon
Off Calendar Oct-23-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PRITESH PATEL INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED's Motion For Dismissal Of Class And Paga Claims Without Prejudice.

The unopposed motion to dismiss Plaintiff's class and PAGA claims without prejudice is granted. The court has considered the request to dismiss the claims with a view toward fairness to absent aggrieved employees and class members. Under the facts set out in the moving papers, there is no prejudice to absent aggrieved employees and class members.

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
